config.section.n8n.label: n8n
config.n8n.info_text: n8n can connect to AuraGo as an AI backend. AuraGo can also trigger n8n webhooks on events. The API token protects the AuraGo n8n endpoint — copy it into your n8n credential.
config.n8n.readonly_hint: When active, n8n can only read data — no chats, tool execution, or writes.
config.n8n.require_token_hint: Require Bearer token authentication for all n8n requests (strongly recommended).
config.n8n.webhook_url_hint: Base URL of your n8n instance for outgoing webhook triggers.
config.n8n.rate_limit_hint: Maximum requests per second from n8n. Set to 0 for unlimited.
config.n8n.token_hint: Generate a token here and enter it as the Bearer token in your n8n AuraGo credential.
config.n8n.token_generated: Token generated — copy it now, it won't be shown again
config.section.firewall.label: Firewall
config.github.readonly_hint: Hvis aktiv, er kun laeseoperationer tilladt (ingen oprettelse af repos, lukning af issues osv.)
config.github.token_hint: Personlig adgangstoken (PAT) - gemmes krypteret i Vault
config.github.base_url_hint: Skift kun for GitHub Enterprise. Standard: https://api.github.com
config.github.default_private_hint: Hvis aktiv, oprettes nye repos som private
config.github.allowed_repos_desc: Agenten maa kun faa adgang til de repos, der er angivet her. Repos oprettet af agenten er altid tilladt. Hvis listen er tom, maa agenten kun faa adgang til repos, den har oprettet.
config.github.fetch_to_edit_hint: Klik paa Hent repos for at redigere listen
config.github.repos_list_empty: Klik paa Hent repos for at indlaese dine GitHub-repos
config.github.agent_created_note: Repos oprettet af agenten er altid tilgaengelige - selv uden eksplicit godkendelse.
